name: What's the deadline to report my work injury in Utah like Taylorsville?

mainEntity.name: What's the deadline to report my work injury in Utah like Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days in Utah, but ASAP to avoid denial[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report within 180 days 'as soon as practicable' or benefits may be barred.** Utah Labor Commission presumes on-premises/clock injuries work-related[1]. Failure without good cause denies claims. **Key factors:** Written notice best for proof; email timestamps help; occupational diseases need medical causation. **Practical guidance:** Notify supervisor now via email detailing facts, then file Form 122. Don't wait for symptoms to worsen. **Timely reports secure coverage.**

description: 180 days in Utah, but ASAP to avoid denial[1].
